title: overgeared + epic knights: antique legacy compat
description: compatibility between epic knight: antique legacy and overgeared
body:
adds overgeared smithing recipes for epic knights: antique legacy

bronze now requires 1 copper ingot and 1 tin nugget on an alloy furnace for 10 bronze nuggets

iron plates from antique legacy are now uncraftable

JEI is recomended

uses sword blueprints for all weapons
